headline: Health insurance stocks slide after Elevance highlights margin pressures (ELV)
summary: Health insurance shares moved sharply lower in premarket trading after Elevance Health’s (NYSE:ELV) latest quarterly results revealed continued pressure on margins within its core Health Benefits business, raising concerns that similar challenges could affect the wider managed-care sector. Margin weakness overshadows earnings beatAlthough Elevance reported second-quarter earnings and revenue that comfortably exceeded analysts’ expectations, investors focused on the deterioration in profitability

headline: Is It Worth Investing in UnitedHealth (UNH) Based on Wall Street's Bullish Views?

headline: Ash Adds Health Care Industry Veteran Jon Stout To Board Of Directors, Names Health Tech Finance Leader Matt Benton CFO
summary: NEW YORK, July 15, 2026--Ash, a leading provider of white-label at-home health testing and care delivery, today announced two additions to its leadership team. Jon Stout has joined Ash's Board of Directors, and Matt Benton has joined as Chief Financial Officer. The appointments add proven operating and financial leadership as Ash rapidly accelerates its work with Medicare Advantage plans nationwide.

raw.headline: Ash Adds Health Care Industry Veteran Jon Stout To Board Of Directors, Names Health Tech Finance Leader Matt Benton CFO
raw.summary: NEW YORK, July 15, 2026--Ash, a leading provider of white-label at-home health testing and care delivery, today announced two additions to its leadership team. Jon Stout has joined Ash's Board of Directors, and Matt Benton has joined as Chief Financial Officer. The appointments add proven operating and financial leadership as Ash rapidly accelerates its work with Medicare Advantage plans nationwide.

headline: Why Elevance Earnings Gave Health Insurance Stocks A Cold; UNH Up Next
summary: Elevance Health topped Q2 earnings estimates Wednesday, despite falling medical membership, but profit was boosted by one-time "below-the-line" factors and the full-year outlook was underwhelming.  ELV stock tumbled, making it among the S&P 500's early laggards.  Molina Healthcare, another S&P 500 managed care stock, joined Elevance among the biggest laggards performers in pre-market trading.

raw.headline: Why Elevance Earnings Gave Health Insurance Stocks A Cold; UNH Up Next

ELV stock tumbled, making it among the S&P 500's early laggards.  Molina Healthcare, another S&P 500 managed care stock, joined Elevance among the biggest laggards performers in pre-market trading.

headline: Insurance stocks fall after Elevance Health results show margin pressure
summary: Investing.com -- Elevance Health’s Health Benefits operating profit collapsed in the second quarter of 2026, igniting a broad premarket selloff across the managed-care sector even as the insurer’s headline earnings handily beat estimates and full-year guidance was lifted.

headline: Elevance Beats Earnings Estimates and There’s Even More Lifting the Stock
summary: Elevance Health  stock rose in premarket trading Wednesday after the health insurer handily cleared analysts’ earnings estimates and boosted its full-year outlook for the second time in months.  For the second quarter, the health insurer posted adjusted earnings of $7.45 a share on revenue of $49.8 billion.  Wall Street was looking for profit of $6.21 and revenue of $48.8 billion.
